reviewer_decision_memo:
Reviewer decision memo
Decision state: internal-only
Selected methodology snapshot: Nielsen-style internal ROI and payback fixture (nielsen_roi_payback_internal_2025_10)
Approval state: finance_approved
Financial claim effect: internal-only: customer-facing ROI/payback requires customer-safe methodology approval.
Strongest safe language: Internal-only: finance-reviewed evidence can support bounded planning language.
Blocked claim language: Customer-facing ROI/payback requires customer-safe methodology approval.
Why stronger claims are blocked: This methodology is finance-approved; financial language is limited to internal-only use until customer-safe approval exists.
High-sensitivity assumptions:
- Ramped quarterly benefit: Quarterly benefit is modeled from adoption and assumed recaptured capacity.
Covered surfaces:
- search
- chat
- ai answers
- agents
- skills
Excluded surfaces:
- mcp actions
- canvas artifacts
- apis
- embedded hosts
Caveats:
- This fixture supports internal financial planning language only.
Upgrade actions:
- Request customer-safe methodology approval before using financial value language with customers.

caveats: Finance approval is scoped to the synthetic workflow and approved assumptions.

ROI is downstream of evidence, controls, outcomes, and finance approval.
